name: Digivice (Season 1)
effect: Must be equipped to digivolve your partner. Glows when wild or hostile Digimon are within 6 spaces — gives advance warning before encounters begin. As a Free Action, scan one visible enemy to learn their Attribute and Element. As a Basic Action, perform a deep scan on one visible enemy to learn their Attribute, Element, and one combat stat of your choice. The Season 1 Digivice supports digivolution up to Ultimate stage. Mega digivolution requires a later Digivice or a special story unlock determined by the GM.
notes: Digivolution cap: Ultimate. Free Action: scan for Attribute + Element. Basic Action: deep scan for Attribute, Element, + 1 combat stat.
